data.title: Interra Copper Expands Stars Property in BC
data.description:
Interra Copper Corp (TSE:IMCX) has released an update.

Interra Copper Corp has significantly expanded its Stars Property in British Columbia by acquiring an additional 5,932 hectares of land, enhancing the site’s mineral potential. This strategic move not only increases the property’s exploration upside but also adds value for shareholders at a minimal cost. The expanded territory now covers a total of 9,693 hectares, including new mineral showings and geophysical anomalies.

For further insights into TSE:IMCX stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Avrupa Minerals Initiates Drilling in Finland
data.description:
Avrupa Minerals (TSE:AVU) has released an update.

Avrupa Minerals Ltd. has begun scout drilling at the Kangasjärvi volcanogenic massive sulfide target in Finland’s Pyhäsalmi Mining District. The company aims to explore two new geophysical targets near a historic mining site, with plans to drill up to 1,000 meters. This initiative marks a significant step in uncovering potential resources in an area previously untested by modern exploration methods.

For further insights into TSE:AVU stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Healthbank Holdings Reduces Loan Amidst Financial Challenges
data.description:
Healthbank Holdings Ltd. (SG:40B) has released an update.

Healthbank Holdings Ltd. has announced a loan reduction agreement with Hainan Fuda Construction Materials Co., Ltd., settling an outstanding principal of over RMB6 million for a final amount of S$400,000. The agreement aims to ensure prompt recovery of part of the outstanding loan amidst Fuda’s financial difficulties. This strategic move highlights Healthbank’s effort to balance investment recovery in the ongoing Atlantis Garden Project.

For further insights into SG:40B stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: EdgeTI Recognized in Gartner Hype Cycle 2024
data.description:
Edge Total Intelligence Inc (TSE:CTRL) has released an update.

Edge Total Intelligence Inc. has been recognized for the first time in the Gartner Hype Cycle for Customer Experience and Monetization in the Communications Industry. The company’s Digital Twin of a Customer (DToC) technology helps communication service providers enhance customer experience and drive revenue growth by simulating and predicting customer behavior.

data.title: Palisades Goldcorp Announces Board Change
data.description:
Palisades Goldcorp Ltd. (TSE:PALI) has released an update.

Palisades Goldcorp Ltd. has announced the resignation of William Hayden from its Board of Directors, as he shifts focus to increasing professional commitments. The company expressed gratitude for his contributions and continues its strategic investments in undervalued resource companies. Palisades remains committed to its dual investment strategy to capitalize on opportunities in the resource sector.

data.title: Newport Exploration Reports on Cooper Basin Royalties
data.description:
Newport Exploration (TSE:NWX) has released an update.

Newport Exploration Ltd updates on its 2.5% gross overriding royalty from Beach Energy’s Cooper Basin activities, noting a slight decline in production and oil prices. The company’s royalty interests remain unaffected by operating decisions at Beach, which reported a 5% drop in Western Flank production. No new drilling occurred this quarter, as Beach focuses on reviewing data for potential future exploration.

For further insights into TSE:NWX stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Village Farms Faces Nasdaq Compliance Challenge
data.description:
Village Farms International (VFF) has released an update.

Village Farms International has received a notification from Nasdaq that its stock price has fallen below the minimum bid requirement of $1.00, posing a risk to its listing status. The company has until April 16, 2025, to regain compliance by reaching the minimum price for at least 10 consecutive days. Meanwhile, Village Farms’ shares will continue to trade on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

For further insights into VFF stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Calidi Biotherapeutics Faces Warrant Delisting by NYSE
data.description:
Calidi Biotherapeutics ( (CLDI) ) has shared an announcement.

Calidi Biotherapeutics, a biotechnology company specializing in targeted antitumor therapies, has been notified by the NYSE that its warrants, trading under CLDI WS, will be delisted due to low trading prices. However, trading of Calidi’s common stock, CLDI, remains unaffected. The company is exploring options to appeal the decision. Calidi continues its focus on developing innovative cancer treatments through its stem cell-based platforms.

Find detailed analytics on CLDI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Tintina Mines Appoints New Director Amidst Stock Option Grant
data.description:
Tintina Mines (TSE:TTS) has released an update.

Tintina Mines Limited has announced the resignation of Director Ricardo Landeta and the appointment of Cesar Garrido, a seasoned professional with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. Additionally, the company has granted 2,550,000 stock options to its directors, officers, and consultants as part of its Stock Option Plan.

For further insights into TSE:TTS stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Petros Pharmaceuticals Amends President’s Employment Terms
data.description:
An update from Petros Pharmaceuticals ( (PTPI) ) is now available.

Petros Pharmaceuticals has amended its employment agreement with President Fady Boctor, allowing him to engage in other consulting roles, provided no conflicts arise. The amendment also adjusts his salary to $280,000 annually and sets the employment term to end on December 31, 2024. This move could signal strategic adjustments within the company’s leadership structure.
